description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:latest Docker image and defines TF_VAR_abuango_pub_key, TF_VAR_aws_access_key, TF_VAR_aws_secret_key, TF_VAR_do_dev_token, and TF_VAR_private_key variables. Add a before_script that runs: echo ${TF_VAR_private_key} > private.key, apk add --no-cache unzip wget ca-certificates, update-ca-certificates, wget -q https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/0.10.8/terraform_0.10.8_linux_amd64.zip -O /terraform.zip, unzip /terraform.zip -d /, and /terraform init -input=false for every job. In the planning stage add a development job that executes /terraform plan and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a deploy_development job that runs only on the master branch, sets the environment name to development with URL https://gitlab.com, and runs /terraform apply.
